name: @nuclescript/benchmarks
description: Standard benchmark workload pool schemas and pipelines matching NucleOS's own fixture set (text, binary, FASTA, image).

exports.name: benchmark_text_archive
exports.description: Illumina archive defaults sized for small text payloads.

exports.name: benchmark_binary_archive
exports.description: Illumina archive defaults sized for binary payloads at higher redundancy.

exports.name: benchmark_fasta_archive
exports.description: Twist archive defaults sized for FASTA sequence data.

exports.name: benchmark_image_archive
exports.description: Nanopore archive defaults sized for image payloads at higher redundancy.

exports.name: small_text_workload
exports.description: Encode, protect, store, and verify a small text file end to end.

exports.name: binary_archive_workload
exports.description: Encode, protect, store, and verify a binary archive file end to end.

exports.name: fasta_workload
exports.description: Encode, protect, store, and verify a FASTA file end to end.

exports.name: image_workload
exports.description: Encode, protect, store, and verify an image payload end to end.
